title: Inconsistent Food Quality and Presentation Issues
description: Customers frequently report issues with food temperature, taste, and presentation. Several reviews highlight dishes arriving cold or with unpleasant flavors, impacting the overall dining experience.
evidence: "demoro en llegar y cuando llegó estaba todo frío, reclamamos al mozo quien muy amable nos trajo otra tabla que también tenía todo bien completo pero los bastones de mozzarella y las empanadas chinas
recommendation: Implement stricter temperature checks for all dishes before serving and conduct a tasting panel for new menu items to ensure consistent flavor profiles.

title: Extended Wait Times Impacting Customer Satisfaction
description: Customers frequently report excessive wait times for both ordering and food delivery, even during non-peak hours. This significantly contributes to negative experiences, with 75% of mentions regarding service speed being negative.
evidence: "Estuvimos mas de 20 minutos para que nos tomen el pedido y mas de 40 esperando la comida" — 24 mentions (75% negative)
recommendation: Implement a system to expedite order taking and food preparation, especially during anticipated busy periods, and consider offering complimentary items for significant delays.

title: Negative Staff Attitude Impacts Customer Experience
description: A significant portion of customer feedback highlights poor staff attitude, including rudeness, inattentiveness, and dismissiveness. This directly affects customer satisfaction and perceived service quality.
evidence: "el mozo se dejó el vuelto. sin opción a q eligiéramos cuanto dejar de propina." — 33.3% negative mentions
recommendation: Implement mandatory customer service training focusing on attentiveness, politeness, and proactive problem-solving for all staff members.

title: Service Speed Issues Impacting Customer Experience
description: A significant portion of feedback highlights slow service, with customers experiencing long waits for orders and food delivery. This is particularly frustrating when other tables are served faster, even with more complex dishes.
evidence: "demoraron más de 30 minutos en traer unas facturas y las mozas con mucha demora de atención" — 64.3% negative mentions
recommendation: Implement a system to track order times and ensure timely delivery of all courses, especially for tables that arrived earlier.

title: Inconsistent Staff Attitude Affects Customer Experience
description: While some staff are praised for attentiveness, a significant portion of feedback highlights negative attitudes, including coldness, arrogance, and poor demeanor. This inconsistency is impacting overall customer satisfaction.
evidence: "Pagamos el total de la cuenta casi 100mil pesos y nos fuimos muy decepcionados por el trato frío y la falta de cortesía ante un error de ellos." - 22.2% negative mentions
recommendation: Implement mandatory customer service training focusing on empathy, problem-solving, and maintaining a positive demeanor, especially during service recovery.

title: Perceived Poor Value for Money
description: Nearly half of customer feedback on price/value is negative, with customers frequently citing high costs for perceived low quality or insufficient portions. Specific complaints highlight expensive small items and discrepancies between advertised and charged prices.
evidence: "Precios demasiado caro ej. $ 48000 una tabla de fritos.....no vuelvo más." — 23 mentions (47.8% negative)
recommendation: Review menu pricing against portion sizes and quality, and ensure all menu descriptions accurately reflect what is served.

title: Limited Menu Options and Availability Issues
description: Customers are expressing dissatisfaction with the reduced variety of main courses, particularly vegetarian and vegan options. There are also frequent stock issues with menu items and drinks, leading to disappointment and extra charges.
evidence: "Acotaron mucho la carta, y encima lo que pedíamos no tenían. Casi nada de variedad en platos vegetarianos, cuando antes si." - 75% negative mentions
recommendation: Expand vegetarian/vegan main course selection and improve inventory management for both food and beverages to ensure availability.

title: Slow Service Impacts Customer Experience
description: Nearly half of mentions regarding service speed are negative, with customers experiencing significant delays in being attended to and receiving their orders. This is particularly noticeable during busy periods.
evidence: "llegamos 21.45 y luego de hubicarnos esperamos hasta las 22.30 para que nos atendieran" - 15 mentions (46.7% negative)
recommendation: Increase staffing during peak hours and implement a system to ensure prompt table greetings and order taking.

title: Staff Attitude: Mixed Reviews, but Positive Outshine Negative
description: While a small percentage of feedback highlights negative staff interactions, the majority of comments praise the team's positive attitude, charisma, and attentiveness. Specific staff members are frequently mentioned for their exceptional service.
evidence: "Cero voluntad. Los mozos un cero." — 11.2% negative mentions
recommendation: Continue recognizing and rewarding staff members like Franco, Juliana, Flor, Nacho, and Tomi for their excellent service and positive attitudes.

title: Service Speed Issues Impacting Customer Experience
description: Customers frequently mention slow service, with 58.3% of mentions being negative. This includes long waits for main courses and perceived rushing by staff. The overall experience is affected, especially during midday meals.
evidence: "Fuimos a mediodía y demoramos 2 hs en comer .... Descartado como opción de almuerzos en al semana." - 12 mentions (58.3% negative)
recommendation: Review staffing levels and kitchen workflow during peak hours, especially for lunch. Train staff on appropriate table clearing timing to avoid perceived rushing.

title: Inconsistent Food Quality Affects Customer Experience
description: While many customers praise the high gastronomic level and delicious dishes, a significant portion (11.8%) report issues with food quality, including cold, overcooked, or misrepresented items. This inconsistency detracts from an otherwise positive dining experience.
evidence: "El lomo llegó frío y al pedir que la calentaran, la trajeron quemada y dura." — 11.8% negative mentions
recommendation: Implement stricter quality control checks for all dishes before serving, focusing on temperature and preparation accuracy.

title: Ambiance: Temperature and Smoking Issues Detract from Experience
description: While many appreciate the beautiful design, a significant portion of feedback highlights discomfort due to heat and the presence of smoking. These issues negatively impact the overall dining experience, even when the restaurant is not busy.
evidence: "NO ENFRIAN LOS AIRES. No deberíamos pasar la noche con calor y comer sólo lechuguita....y el salon tenía solo 4 mesas ocupadas adentro." - 26.7% negative mentions
recommendation: Investigate and improve air conditioning efficiency, especially during warmer months, and enforce a strict no-smoking policy in all dining areas.

title: Menu Flexibility and Availability Issues
description: Customers express frustration with inflexible menu options and restrictions on ordering certain items outside of stated hours. This leads to dissatisfaction and a perception of poor service.
evidence: "el \"chef no hace ningun cambio porque le falta gente en la cocina"." - 54.5% negative mentions
recommendation: Empower staff to make minor menu modifications and clarify ordering cut-off times for specific menu sections.

title: Inconsistent Pasta and Appetizer Quality
description: While many customers praise the pasta and appetizers, a significant portion report issues with food temperature and preparation. This inconsistency detracts from an otherwise positive dining experience.
evidence: "23.45 nos trajeron el plato principal de los cuales 3 devolvimos porque o estaban fríos y en mi caso crudo" - 10.3% negative mentions
recommendation: Implement stricter temperature checks for all dishes before serving and retrain kitchen staff on proper cooking and reheating procedures.

title: Reservation Issues and Outdated Information
description: Customers are experiencing frustration with outdated information on social media and a lack of responsiveness to booking inquiries. Upon arrival, reservations are not always honored, leading to disappointment and unexpected costs.
evidence: "Se desentienden del Wp y las redes. Tenés que ir en persona para enterarte." - 3 mentions (100% negative)
recommendation: Implement a system for real-time updates on social media menus and reservation availability, and train staff on proper reservation management and seating protocols.

title: Menu Availability Issues Frustrate Diners
description: Customers are frequently encountering unavailable menu items, leading to disappointment. This issue is compounded by a lack of advance notice regarding sold-out items and perceived discrepancies in ingredient availability.
evidence: "NO HAY PIZZAS! lo peor es que no te advierte cuando te indican que abras la carta." — 35.7% negative mentions
recommendation: Implement a system to immediately update menu availability status for staff and customers, especially for popular or limited-time items.

title: Reservation Issues Lead to Customer Dissatisfaction
description: Customers are experiencing significant frustration with the booking and reservation process. Issues range from incorrect pricing after booking to being denied tables despite visible availability.
evidence: "Hicimos reserva para 20 personas una semana antes...cerramos el costo, luego me llamaron para decirme que se habían equivocado y que tenía que abonar una diferencia" — 2 mentions (100% negative)
recommendation: Implement a clear reservation confirmation process with locked-in pricing and train staff on accurate table availability communication.

title: Hygiene concerns impact customer perception
description: Customers express significant dissatisfaction with the restaurant's cleanliness, specifically mentioning the restrooms and the presence of pests. This raises concerns about overall hygiene standards.
evidence: "los baños parecen de estación, su estado es marginal, espero que la cocina esté en mejor condiciones higiénicas" — 2 mentions (100% negative)
recommendation: Implement a rigorous daily cleaning schedule for restrooms and conduct a thorough pest control inspection immediately.

title: Mixed Overall Experiences, Leaning Negative
description: While some customers report wonderful experiences, a significant portion (57.1%) express dissatisfaction. This inconsistency suggests a need to address the factors contributing to negative visits.
evidence: "Es la segunda mala experiencia con este lugar. No lo recomiendo" — 57.1% negative
recommendation: Investigate recurring negative experiences by reviewing customer feedback for specific issues and implementing targeted service improvements.

title: Price/Value Concerns: High Prices, Small Portions
description: Customers frequently mention high prices relative to portion sizes, with some experiencing discrepancies in advertised discounts. While a few find the value good, the majority express dissatisfaction with the cost-to-food ratio.
evidence: "Lo único abundante son los precios comparado a la poca comida del plato." — 9 mentions (44.4% negative)
recommendation: Review portion sizes for key dishes and ensure advertised discounts are accurately applied to bills.

title: Exceptional Sushi and Desserts, but Inconsistent Meat Dishes
description: Customers rave about the unique and delicious flavors of the sushi and desserts, often calling them works of art. However, some negative feedback highlights a lack of flavor and poor preparation in meat dishes.
evidence: "cada pieza de sushi es una obra de arte: sabor, frescura y presentación se fusionan para crear una experiencia única." — 5.9% negative mentions
recommendation: Maintain high standards for sushi and desserts. Investigate and improve the preparation and flavor profiles of pork and other meat dishes.

title: Ambiance: Mixed Reviews on Decor and Noise
description: While some customers praise the magnificent decor, flowers, plants, and architecture, others find the ambiance uncomfortable due to white spotlight-like lighting, a cemetery-like floral arrangement, and excessive noise. The overall feeling is described as cold and outdated by some.
evidence: "Horrible la ambientación de flores tipo cementerio, como que quisieron inventar algo sofisticado y top pero pasado de moda" — 57 mentions (8.8% negative)
recommendation: Review lighting and floral arrangements for a warmer feel. Consider sound dampening solutions to reduce noise levels and adjust music volume.

title: Hygiene concerns impact customer experience
description: Customers report significant hygiene issues, including finding insects in drinks and dirty children's play areas. This 100% negative feedback indicates a critical need for immediate attention to cleanliness standards.
evidence: "mi hija toma un sorbo del cafe y se saca de la boca una mosca muerta!!!!! Q asco" - 2 mentions (100% negative)
recommendation: Implement a rigorous daily cleaning schedule for all areas, especially food service items and children's play equipment, with staff training on hygiene protocols.

title: Price/Value Perception Mixed, Service Impacts Value
description: While some customers find prices aligned with offerings, a significant portion (40%) feel the value is poor, often linking it directly to perceived low service quality. This suggests service issues are detracting from the perceived worth of the dining experience.
evidence: "el servicio deja mucho que desear la atención. Pongo puntaje bajo en servicio a la relación a los precios." — 40% negative mentions
recommendation: Investigate service quality issues and staff training to ensure it aligns with price points, thereby improving overall customer value perception.

title: Exceptional Staff Service Enhances Dining Experience
description: The majority of feedback highlights outstanding staff attentiveness and helpfulness, with specific mentions of Sabrina, Matías, and Carlos. This positive interaction significantly contributes to a welcoming and enjoyable atmosphere for guests.
evidence: "Destaco por sobretodo la atención de la encargada que nos recibió, Sabrina que nos atendió excelente" — 68 mentions (4.4% negative)
recommendation: Recognize and reward staff members like Sabrina, Matías, and Carlos for their exemplary service and share best practices with the entire team.

title: Severe Food Contamination Incident
description: A customer reported severe illness, including nausea and vomiting, after consuming a rotten sweet potato side dish. This indicates a critical failure in food preparation and handling standards.
evidence: "literally rotten, with a taste of dirt that caused nausea when chewing" — 1 mention (100% negative)
recommendation: Immediately inspect all food storage and preparation areas, and retrain staff on food safety and quality control protocols.

title: Ambiance: Music volume and smoking are concerns
description: While many customers find the ambiance pleasant, a notable minority are negatively impacted by loud music and smoking in semi-enclosed areas. These issues detract from the overall dining experience for some patrons.
evidence: "el volumen de la música estaba súper alta y repitió la misma canción aproximadamente 5 veces en el lapso de 1 hora." - 7.9% negative mentions
recommendation: Monitor music volume levels and enforce designated smoking areas to ensure a comfortable environment for all guests.

title: Price Perception Mixed, Leaning Towards High
description: While some customers find the price reasonable for the quality, a significant portion feels prices are too high for the offering in terms of quality and quantity. This suggests a potential disconnect in perceived value.
evidence: "Los precios muy elevados para que es, en cuanto calidad y cantidad." — 16.7% negative mentions
recommendation: Review portion sizes and ingredient quality to better justify current pricing, or consider minor price adjustments for specific dishes.

title: Poor Quality in Takeaway Dishes
description: Customers are reporting a significant decline in the quality of takeaway food. Specifically, dishes are lacking key ingredients and are described as dry and flavorless.
evidence: "Cero queso blanco, cero, nada. Y dos cucharadas de un arroz seco y sin sabor." — 1 mention (100% negative)
recommendation: Review the preparation and packaging process for takeaway dishes to ensure ingredient accuracy and maintain food quality.

title: Reservation Seating Delays
description: Half of customers mentioning reservations experienced delays in being seated, despite arriving on time. This indicates a potential bottleneck in managing booked tables.
evidence: "hubo demora en ubicarnos (teniendo reserva)" - 2 mentions (50% negative)
recommendation: Review table turnover procedures and host stand communication to ensure timely seating for all reservations.

title: Positive Overall Experience Drives Repeat Visits
description: The majority of feedback highlights a positive overall experience, with customers expressing a desire to return. This indicates strong customer satisfaction and loyalty.
evidence: "We ll definitely come back." — 18 mentions (94.4% positive)
recommendation: Continue to focus on delivering excellent service and ambiance to encourage repeat business and positive word-of-mouth.

title: Overall Experience: Mostly Positive with Isolated Negative Incidents
description: The majority of customers report a highly positive overall experience, praising the ambiance and quality. However, a small percentage feel uncomfortable or out of place, indicating a need for consistent service delivery.
evidence: "Sentí la sensación de estar en un restaurante de mundo." - 20 mentions (5% negative)
recommendation: Reinforce staff training on creating a welcoming atmosphere for all guests, especially during special occasions.

title: Ambiance is a strong point, with minor lighting concerns
description: The restaurant's ambiance is generally praised for its sensory elements, modern decor, and intimate atmosphere. However, a small number of customers find the lighting insufficient.
evidence: "un poco más de iluminación ya que solo hay velas en las mesas" — 2.2% negative mentions
recommendation: Consider adding subtle, adjustable ambient lighting in addition to candles to improve visibility without compromising intimacy.

title: Reservation Flexibility and Table Allocation Issues
description: Customers express dissatisfaction with rigid reservation policies and perceived unfair table allocation. One guest was denied their preferred table, which remained unoccupied.
evidence: "no nos dejaron sentarnos en la mesa que queriamos, que nunca se ocupó hasta que no fuimos" — 1 mention (100% negative)
recommendation: Empower staff to offer flexibility with table assignments when possible, especially if preferred tables remain unused.

title: Inconsistent Takeaway Service & Limited Delivery Options
description: Customers are experiencing issues with takeaway orders not being fulfilled as promised, and there's a desire for expanded delivery or later takeaway pickup times. This impacts customer satisfaction for off-premise dining.
evidence: "Nos dijeron si queríamos llevar la comida q sobró pero nunca la trajeron." — 2 mentions (50% negative)
recommendation: Implement a clear process for packaging leftover food for takeaway and explore options for extending takeaway pickup hours or introducing a delivery service.

title: Consistently Excellent Overall Experience
description: Customers consistently praise the overall experience at IDA Restaurant Bar, highlighting food, service, and ambiance. This positive sentiment is reflected in a high priority score and numerous glowing reviews.
evidence: "Excelente experiencia! Tanto la comida como de la atención a nosotros!" — 14 mentions (7.1% negative)
recommendation: Continue maintaining high standards across food, service, and ambiance to ensure sustained customer satisfaction and loyalty.

title: Menu Variety and Quality
description: Customers praise the menu's breadth, particularly the pasta specialties, and appreciate the extensive drink and food options. The availability of dedicated parking is also a highlight.
evidence: "El menú es amplio tanto en bebidas como en comidas" — 9 mentions (0% negative)
recommendation: Continue highlighting pasta specialties and consider expanding the menu based on customer feedback.
